Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class ReturnOrder

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.ReturnOrder
public class ReturnOrder extends SObject

Java class for ReturnOrder complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ReturnOrder">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Account" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Account" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AccountId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ActivityHistories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AttachedContentDocuments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Attachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Case" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Case" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CaseId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CombinedAttachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Contact" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Contact" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContactId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentDocumentLinks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DestinationLocation" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Location" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DestinationLocationId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Emails" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Events" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExpectedArrivalDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExpirationDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FeedSubscriptionsForEntity" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Feeds" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GrandTotalAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Histories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastReferencedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastViewedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LifeCycleType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LookedUpFromActivities" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Notes" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NotesAndAttachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OpenActivities" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Order" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Order" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OrderId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Owner" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OwnerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessExceptions" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessInstances" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessSteps" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordActionHistories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordActions" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReturnOrderItemAdjustments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReturnOrderItemTaxes" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReturnOrderLineItems" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReturnOrderNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReturnedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReturnedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Shares" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShipFromAddress" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}address" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShipFromCity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShipFromCountry" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShipFromGeocodeAccuracy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShipFromLatitude" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShipFromLongitude" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShipFromPostalCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShipFromState" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShipFromStreet" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShipmentType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SourceLocation" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Location" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SourceLocationId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="StatusCategory" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Tasks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TaxLocaleType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TopicAssignments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalDeliveryAdjustAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalDeliveryAdjustAmtWithTax" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalDeliveryAdjustTaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalDeliveryAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalDeliveryAmtWithTax" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalDeliveryTaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalFeeAdjustAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalFeeAdjustAmtWithTax" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalFeeAdjustTaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalFeeAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalFeeAmtWithTax" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalFeeTaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalProductAdjustAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalProductAdjustAmtWithTax" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalProductAdjustTaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalProductAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalProductAmtWithTax" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalProductTaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalTaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
